tools.name: attachments.acceptAttachment
tools.description:
Accepts a core network attachment request.

Once the attachment request is accepted by a core network owner, the attachment is created and connected to a core network.

tools.name: attachments.deleteAttachment
tools.description: Deletes an attachment. Supports all attachment types.

tools.name: attachments.listAttachments
tools.description: Returns a list of core network attachments.

tools.name: attachments.rejectAttachment
tools.description: Rejects a core network attachment request.

tools.name: connectAttachments.createConnectAttachment
tools.description:
Creates a core network Connect attachment from a specified core network attachment.

A core network Connect attachment is a GRE-based tunnel attachment that you can use to establish a connection between a core network and an appliance. A core network Connect attachment uses an existing VPC attachment as the underlying transport mechanism.

tools.name: connectAttachments.getConnectAttachment
tools.description: Returns information about a core network Connect attachment.

tools.name: connectPeers.createConnectPeer
tools.description: Creates a core network Connect peer for a specified core network connect attachment between a core network and an appliance. The peer address and transit gateway address must be the same IP address family (IPv4 or IPv6).

tools.name: connectPeers.deleteConnectPeer
tools.description: Deletes a Connect peer.

tools.name: connectPeers.getConnectPeer
tools.description: Returns information about a core network Connect peer.

tools.name: connectPeers.listConnectPeers
tools.description: Returns a list of core network Connect peers.

tools.name: coreNetworks.createCoreNetwork
tools.description: Creates a core network as part of your global network, and optionally, with a core network policy.

tools.name: coreNetworks.deleteCoreNetwork
tools.description: Deletes a core network along with all core network policies. This can only be done if there are no attachments on a core network.

tools.name: coreNetworks.deleteCoreNetworkPolicyVersion
tools.description: Deletes a policy version from a core network. You can't delete the current LIVE policy.

tools.name: coreNetworks.executeCoreNetworkChangeSet
tools.description: Executes a change set on your core network. Deploys changes globally based on the policy submitted..

tools.name: coreNetworks.getCoreNetwork
tools.description: Returns information about the LIVE policy for a core network.

tools.name: coreNetworks.getCoreNetworkChangeEvents
tools.description: Returns information about a core network change event.

tools.name: coreNetworks.getCoreNetworkChangeSet
tools.description: Returns a change set between the LIVE core network policy and a submitted policy.

tools.name: coreNetworks.getCoreNetworkPolicy
tools.description: Returns details about a core network policy. You can get details about your current live policy or any previous policy version.

tools.name: coreNetworks.listCoreNetworkPolicyVersions
tools.description: Returns a list of core network policy versions.

tools.name: coreNetworks.listCoreNetworks
tools.description: Returns a list of owned and shared core networks.

tools.name: coreNetworks.putCoreNetworkPolicy
tools.description: Creates a new, immutable version of a core network policy. A subsequent change set is created showing the differences between the LIVE policy and the submitted policy.

tools.name: coreNetworks.restoreCoreNetworkPolicyVersion
tools.description: Restores a previous policy version as a new, immutable version of a core network policy. A subsequent change set is created showing the differences between the LIVE policy and restored policy.

tools.name: coreNetworks.updateCoreNetwork
tools.description: Updates the description of a core network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.associateConnectPeer
tools.description:
Associates a core network Connect peer with a device and optionally, with a link.

If you specify a link, it must be associated with the specified device. You can only associate core network Connect peers that have been created on a core network Connect attachment on a core network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.associateCustomerGateway
tools.description:
Associates a customer gateway with a device and optionally, with a link. If you specify a link, it must be associated with the specified device.

You can only associate customer gateways that are connected to a VPN attachment on a transit gateway or core network registered in your global network. When you register a transit gateway or core network, customer gateways that are connected to the transit gateway are automatically included in the global network. To list customer gateways that are connected to a transit gateway, use the DescribeVpnConnections EC2 API and filter by transit-gateway-id.

You cannot associate a customer gateway with more than one device and link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.associateLink
tools.description: Associates a link to a device. A device can be associated to multiple links and a link can be associated to multiple devices. The device and link must be in the same global network and the same site.

tools.name: globalNetworks.associateTransitGatewayConnectPeer
tools.description:
Associates a transit gateway Connect peer with a device, and optionally, with a link. If you specify a link, it must be associated with the specified device.

You can only associate transit gateway Connect peers that have been created on a transit gateway that's registered in your global network.

You cannot associate a transit gateway Connect peer with more than one device and link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.createConnection
tools.description: Creates a connection between two devices. The devices can be a physical or virtual appliance that connects to a third-party appliance in a VPC, or a physical appliance that connects to another physical appliance in an on-premises network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.createDevice
tools.description: Creates a new device in a global network. If you specify both a site ID and a location, the location of the site is used for visualization in the Network Manager console.

tools.name: globalNetworks.createGlobalNetwork
tools.description: Creates a new, empty global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.createLink
tools.description: Creates a new link for a specified site.

tools.name: globalNetworks.createSite
tools.description: Creates a new site in a global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.deleteConnection
tools.description: Deletes the specified connection in your global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.deleteDevice
tools.description: Deletes an existing device. You must first disassociate the device from any links and customer gateways.

tools.name: globalNetworks.deleteGlobalNetwork
tools.description: Deletes an existing global network. You must first delete all global network objects (devices, links, and sites), deregister all transit gateways, and delete any core networks.

tools.name: globalNetworks.deleteLink
tools.description: Deletes an existing link. You must first disassociate the link from any devices and customer gateways.

tools.name: globalNetworks.deleteSite
tools.description: Deletes an existing site. The site cannot be associated with any device or link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.deregisterTransitGateway
tools.description: Deregisters a transit gateway from your global network. This action does not delete your transit gateway, or modify any of its attachments. This action removes any customer gateway associations.

tools.name: globalNetworks.describeGlobalNetworks
tools.description: Describes one or more global networks. By default, all global networks are described. To describe the objects in your global network, you must use the appropriate Get* action. For example, to list the transit gateways in your global network, use GetTransitGatewayRegistrations.

tools.name: globalNetworks.disassociateConnectPeer
tools.description: Disassociates a core network Connect peer from a device and a link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.disassociateCustomerGateway
tools.description: Disassociates a customer gateway from a device and a link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.disassociateLink
tools.description: Disassociates an existing device from a link. You must first disassociate any customer gateways that are associated with the link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.disassociateTransitGatewayConnectPeer
tools.description: Disassociates a transit gateway Connect peer from a device and link.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getConnections
tools.description: Gets information about one or more of your connections in a global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getConnectPeerAssociations
tools.description: Returns information about a core network Connect peer associations.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getCustomerGatewayAssociations
tools.description: Gets the association information for customer gateways that are associated with devices and links in your global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getDevices
tools.description: Gets information about one or more of your devices in a global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getLinkAssociations
tools.description: Gets the link associations for a device or a link. Either the device ID or the link ID must be specified.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getLinks
tools.description:
Gets information about one or more links in a specified global network.

If you specify the site ID, you cannot specify the type or provider in the same request. You can specify the type and provider in the same request.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getNetworkResourceCounts
tools.description: Gets the count of network resources, by resource type, for the specified global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getNetworkResourceRelationships
tools.description: Gets the network resource relationships for the specified global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getNetworkResources
tools.description:
Describes the network resources for the specified global network.

The results include information from the corresponding Describe call for the resource, minus any sensitive information such as pre-shared keys.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getNetworkRoutes
tools.description: Gets the network routes of the specified global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getNetworkTelemetry
tools.description: Gets the network telemetry of the specified global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getRouteAnalysis
tools.description: Gets information about the specified route analysis.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getSites
tools.description: Gets information about one or more of your sites in a global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getTransitGatewayConnectPeerAssociations
tools.description: Gets information about one or more of your transit gateway Connect peer associations in a global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.getTransitGatewayRegistrations
tools.description: Gets information about the transit gateway registrations in a specified global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.registerTransitGateway
tools.description: Registers a transit gateway in your global network. Not all Regions support transit gateways for global networks. For a list of the supported Regions, see Region Availability in the Amazon Web Services Transit Gateways for Global Networks User Guide. The transit gateway can be in any of the supported Amazon Web Services Regions, but it must be owned by the same Amazon Web Services account that owns the global network. You cannot register a transit gateway in more than one global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.startRouteAnalysis
tools.description: Starts analyzing the routing path between the specified source and destination. For more information, see Route Analyzer.

tools.name: globalNetworks.updateConnection
tools.description: Updates the information for an existing connection. To remove information for any of the parameters, specify an empty string.

tools.name: globalNetworks.updateDevice
tools.description: Updates the details for an existing device. To remove information for any of the parameters, specify an empty string.

tools.name: globalNetworks.updateGlobalNetwork
tools.description: Updates an existing global network. To remove information for any of the parameters, specify an empty string.

tools.name: globalNetworks.updateLink
tools.description: Updates the details for an existing link. To remove information for any of the parameters, specify an empty string.

tools.name: globalNetworks.updateNetworkResourceMetadata
tools.description: Updates the resource metadata for the specified global network.

tools.name: globalNetworks.updateSite
tools.description: Updates the information for an existing site. To remove information for any of the parameters, specify an empty string.

tools.name: organizations.listOrganizationServiceAccessStatus
tools.description: Gets the status of the Service Linked Role (SLR) deployment for the accounts in a given Amazon Web Services Organization.

tools.name: organizations.startOrganizationServiceAccessUpdate
tools.description: Enables the Network Manager service for an Amazon Web Services Organization. This can only be called by a management account within the organization.

tools.name: peerings.deletePeering
tools.description: Deletes an existing peering connection.

tools.name: peerings.listPeerings
tools.description: Lists the peerings for a core network.

tools.name: resourcePolicy.deleteResourcePolicy
tools.description: Deletes a resource policy for the specified resource. This revokes the access of the principals specified in the resource policy.

tools.name: resourcePolicy.getResourcePolicy
tools.description: Returns information about a resource policy.

tools.name: resourcePolicy.putResourcePolicy
tools.description: Creates or updates a resource policy.

tools.name: siteToSiteVpnAttachments.createSiteToSiteVpnAttachment
tools.description: Creates an Amazon Web Services site-to-site VPN attachment on an edge location of a core network.

tools.name: siteToSiteVpnAttachments.getSiteToSiteVpnAttachment
tools.description: Returns information about a site-to-site VPN attachment.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags for a specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Tags a specified resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from a specified resource.

tools.name: transitGatewayPeerings.createTransitGatewayPeering
tools.description: Creates a transit gateway peering connection.

tools.name: transitGatewayPeerings.getTransitGatewayPeering
tools.description: Returns information about a transit gateway peer.

tools.name: transitGatewayRouteTableAttachments.createTransitGatewayRouteTableAttachment
tools.description: Creates a transit gateway route table attachment.

tools.name: transitGatewayRouteTableAttachments.getTransitGatewayRouteTableAttachment
tools.description: Returns information about a transit gateway route table attachment.

tools.name: vpcAttachments.createVpcAttachment
tools.description: Creates a VPC attachment on an edge location of a core network.

tools.name: vpcAttachments.getVpcAttachment
tools.description: Returns information about a VPC attachment.

tools.name: vpcAttachments.updateVpcAttachment
tools.description: Updates a VPC attachment.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
